title: 100% Pure Egyptian Cotton Hotel Quality Super Soft Thick Absorbent Quick Dry Kensington Satin Stripe Towels - Hand Towel, Bath Towel, Bath Sheet (Black, Bath Sheet - Pack 2)
features: ‎Premium Quality -100% Egyptian Cotton - 500GSM - Super Soft - Thick - Highly Absorbent - Quick Dry - Skin Friendly. Luxury 100% Egyptian Cotton Hotel Quality Towel Range Extra Soft and Highly Absorbent. 500 GSM TOWELS: Fluffy bath towels are made of 100% enduring cotton material. Ringspun cotton makes the texture of sheets smooth and soft.
QUICK DRY BATH TOWELS: Super absorbent bath towels have a huge quality to absorb the water and keep warm your body. The 100% cotton sheets dry your body and give you a smooth and congenial touch.

FAST ABSORB AND USE: Splendid Egyptian cotton bath towels are used in the home to dry off hands after the wash. Many luxury hotels use bath towels for bathrooms. You can also use a quick dry bath towel in the gym during workout time.
EASY CARE: Easy to maintain with machine washability, these towels remain soft and vibrant after each wash, offering hassle-free care and long-term use.
description: Indulge yourself in blissful comfort with our luxury 100% Egyptian Cotton towels formed of 600gsm Egyptian Cotton pile and extra-long fibres for superior absorbency and durability. Like many fine fabrics, Egyptian Cotton takes time "to settle". The more you use Egyptian Cotton, the more relaxed, softer and pliable the fabric will feel, because the Egyptian Cotton fabric improves in time with use. Also, this spectacular weight of 600GSM Cotton lasts longer than conventional blended cotton. Due to its softness and strength the Egyptian Cotton fabric is recommended for people with delicate skin because it has a higher comfort than regular blends of cotton. The available sizes are: hand towel 50x80cm, bath towel 70x120cm, bath sheet 90x140cm and jumbo bath sheet 80x170cm. These luxurious towels are sold as follows: Hand Towels pack of 3 - Bath Sheet pack of 3 - Jumbo Bath Sheet pack of 2. Washing instructions: machine washable at 40°C, can be tumble dried. Please, note, the colour may slightly vary from real ones due to the different parameters of brightness and contrast on your monitor.
